constantpool.c

Go to the documentation of this file.

00003  *   gabriele.svelto@gmail.com                                             *

00006  *                                                                         *

00008  *   it under the terms of the GNU General Public License as published by  *
00009  *   the Free Software Foundation, either version 3 of the License, or     *

00013  *   but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of        *

00019  ***************************************************************************/
00020 
00024 #include "wrappers.h"
00025 
00026 #include "class.h"
00027 #include "constantpool.h"
00028 #include "jstring.h"
00029 #include "memory.h"
00030 #include "utf8_string.h"
00031 #include "util.h"
00032 
00033 /******************************************************************************
00034  * Local declarations                                                         *
00035  ******************************************************************************/
00036 
00038 static const_pool_t dummy_cp = { 0, NULL, { 0 } };
00039 
00040 /******************************************************************************
00041  * Constant pool implementation                                               *
00042  ******************************************************************************/
00043 
00049 static const_pool_type_t tag_read(uint8_t *tags, uint32_t entry)
00050 {
00051     unsigned int offset = (entry % 2) * 4;
00052 
00053     return (tags[entry / 2] >> offset) & 0x0f;
00054 } // tag_read()
00055 
00061 static void tag_write(uint8_t *tags, uint32_t entry, const_pool_type_t data)
00062 {
00063     unsigned int offset = (entry % 2) * 4;
00064     unsigned int mask = 0xf0 >> offset;
00065 
00066     tags[entry / 2] = (tags[entry / 2] & mask) | (data << offset);
00067 } // tag_write()
00068 
00074 const_pool_t *cp_create(class_t *cl, class_file_t *cf)
00075 {
00076     const_pool_t *cp;
00077     uint8_t *tags;
00078     jword_t *data;
00079     uint8_t tag;
00080     uint16_t entries, u2_data;
00081 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00082     uint32_t u4_data;
00083 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00084     uint64_t u8_data;
00085     size_t len;
00086 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00087     float f_data;
00088     double d_data;
00089 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00090     char *str;
00091     char *utf8_str;
00092     uintptr_t jstring;
00093 
00094     entries = cf_load_u2(cf);
00095     cp = gc_palloc(sizeof(const_pool_t) + sizeof(jword_t) * entries);
00096     cp->entries = entries;
00097     cp->tags = gc_palloc(size_div_inf(entries, 2));
00098 
00099     tags = cp->tags;
00100     data = cp->data;
00101 
00102     /* The first constant pool element is empty, we fill it with the class
00103      * pointer */
00104     tag_write(tags, 0, 0);
00105     data[0] = (uintptr_t) cl;
00106 
00107     for (size_t i = 1; i < entries; i++) {
00108         tag = cf_load_u1(cf);
00109         tag_write(tags, i, tag);
00110 
00111         switch (tag) {
00112             case CONSTANT_Utf8:
00113                 len =  cf_load_u2(cf);
00114                 str = (char *) gc_malloc(len + 1);
00115 
00116                 for (size_t j = 0; j < len; j++) {
00117                     str[j] = cf_load_u1(cf);
00118                 }
00119 
00120                 utf8_str = utf8_intern(str, len);
00121                 cp_data_set_ptr(data, i, utf8_str);
00122                 gc_free(str);
00123 
00124                 break;
00125 
00126             case CONSTANT_Integer:
00127                 cp_data_set_int32(data, i, (int32_t) cf_load_u4(cf));
00128                 break;
00129 
00130 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00131             case CONSTANT_Float:
00132                 // We do the memcpy() to respect strict aliasing constraints
00133                 u4_data = cf_load_u4(cf);
00134                 memcpy(&f_data, &u4_data, sizeof(float));
00135                 cp_data_set_float(data, i, f_data);
00136                 break;
00137 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00138 
00139             case CONSTANT_Long:
00140                 u8_data = (uint64_t) cf_load_u4(cf) << 32;
00141                 u8_data |= cf_load_u4(cf);
00142                 cp_data_set_int64(data, i, (int64_t) u8_data);
00143                 /* 8-byte objects take two constant pool entries, make the next
00144                  * constant pool entry valid but unusable */
00145                 i++;
00146                 tag_write(tags, i, 0);
00147 
00148                 break;
00149 
00150 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00151             case CONSTANT_Double:
00152 #if WORDS_BIGENDIAN != FLOAT_WORDS_BIGENDIAN
00153                 // We're on a weird ARM target with middle-endian doubles
00154                 u8_data = cf_load_u4(cf);
00155                 u8_data = (uint64_t) cf_load_u4(cf) << 32;
00156 #else
00157                 u8_data = (uint64_t) cf_load_u4(cf) << 32;
00158                 u8_data |= cf_load_u4(cf);
00159 #endif // WORDS_BIGENDIAN != FLOAT_WORDS_BIGENDIAN
00160                 memcpy(&d_data, &u8_data, sizeof(double));
00161                 cp_data_set_double(data, i, d_data);
00162                 /* 8-byte objects take two constant pool entries, make the next
00163                  * constant pool entry valid but unusable */
00164                 i++;
00165                 tag_write(tags, i, 0);
00166 
00167                 break;
00168 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00169 
00170             case CONSTANT_Class:
00171             case CONSTANT_String:
00172                 u2_data = cf_load_u2(cf);
00173                 cp_data_set_uint16(data, i, u2_data);
00174                 break;
00175 
00176             case CONSTANT_Fieldref:
00177             case CONSTANT_Methodref:
00178             case CONSTANT_InterfaceMethodref:
00179                 u2_data = cf_load_u2(cf);
00180                 cp_data_set_fieldref_class(data, i, u2_data);
00181                 u2_data = cf_load_u2(cf);
00182                 cp_data_set_fieldref_name_and_type(data, i, u2_data);
00183                 break;
00184 
00185             case CONSTANT_NameAndType:
00186                 u2_data = cf_load_u2(cf);
00187                 cp_data_set_name_and_type_name(data, i, u2_data);
00188                 u2_data = cf_load_u2(cf);
00189                 cp_data_set_name_and_type_descriptor(data, i, u2_data);
00190                 break;
00191 
00192             default:
00193                 c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00194                         "Unknown constant pool tag value");
00195         }
00196     }
00197 
00198     // Check and process the various string entries
00199 
00200     for (size_t i = 0; i < (size_t)entries - 1; i++) {
00201         tag = tag_read(tags, i);
00202 
00203         switch (tag) {
00204             case CONSTANT_Utf8:
00205                 if (cp_data_get_ptr(data, i) == NULL) {
00206                     break;
00207                 }
00208 
00209                 if (!utf8_check(cp_data_get_ptr(data, i))) {
00210                     c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00211                             "Malformed CONSTANT_Utf8 entry");
00212                 }
00213 
00214                 break;
00215 
00216             case CONSTANT_String:
00217                 u2_data = cp_data_get_uint16(data, i);
00218 
00219                 if ((u2_data >= entries) || (u2_data == 0)) {
00220                     c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00221                             "Malformed CONSTANT_String entry, string_index is "
00222                             "out of bounds");
00223                 }
00224 
00225                 if (tag_read(tags, u2_data) != CONSTANT_Utf8) {
00226                     c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00227                             "Malformed CONSTANT_String entry, string_index "
00228                             "doesn't point to a CONSTANT_Utf8 entry");
00229                 }
00230 
00231                 jstring = JAVA_LANG_STRING_PTR2REF(
00232                     jstring_create_literal(*((char **) (data + u2_data))));
00233 
00234                 cp_data_set_uintptr(data, i, (uintptr_t) jstring);
00235                 break;
00236 
00237             default:
00238                 continue;
00239         }
00240     }
00241 
00242     return cp;
00243 } // cp_create()
00244 
00248 const_pool_t *cp_create_dummy( void )
00249 {
00250     return &dummy_cp;
00251 } // cp_create_dummy()
00252 
00258 const_pool_type_t cp_get_tag(const_pool_t *cp, uint16_t entry)
00259 {
00260     if (entry >= cp->entries) {
00261         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00262                 "Constant pool index out of bounds");
00263     } else {
00264         return tag_read(cp->tags, entry);
00265     }
00266 } // cp_get_tag()
00267 
00276 void cp_set_tag_and_data(const_pool_t *cp, uint16_t entry, uint8_t tag,
00277                          void *data)
00278 {
00279     assert(entry < cp->entries);
00280 
00281     tag_write(cp->tags, entry, tag);
00282     cp_data_set_ptr(cp->data, entry, data);
00283 } // cp_set_tag_and_data()
00284 
00291 char *cp_get_class_name(const_pool_t *cp, uint16_t entry)
00292 {
00293     const_pool_type_t tag = cp_get_tag(cp, entry);
00294     uint16_t class_index;
00295 
00296     if (tag == CONSTANT_Class_resolved) {
00297         return ((class_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp->data, entry))->name;
00298     }
00299 
00300     if (tag != CONSTANT_Class) {
00301         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR, "Not a CONSTANT_Class entry");
00302     }
00303 
00304     class_index = cp_data_get_uint16(cp->data, entry);
00305     return cp_get_string(cp, class_index);
00306 } // cp_get_class_name()
00307 
00315 char *cp_get_string(const_pool_t *cp, uint16_t entry)
00316 {
00317     const_pool_type_t tag = cp_get_tag(cp, entry);
00318 
00319     if (tag != CONSTANT_Utf8) {
00320         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR, "Not a CONSTANT_Utf8 entry");
00321     }
00322 
00323     return (char *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp->data, entry);
00324 } // cp_get_string()
00325 
00333 uintptr_t cp_get_ref(const_pool_t *cp, uint16_t entry)
00334 {
00335     const_pool_type_t tag = cp_get_tag(cp, entry);
00336 
00337     if ((tag != CONSTANT_String) && (tag != CONSTANT_Class)) {
00338         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00339                 "Not a CONSTANT_String or CONSTANT_Class entry");
00340     }
00341 
00342     return cp_data_get_uintptr(cp->data, entry);
00343 } // cp_get_ref()
00344 
00352 int32_t cp_get_integer(const_pool_t *cp, uint16_t entry)
00353 {
00354     const_pool_type_t tag = cp_get_tag(cp, entry);
00355 
00356     if (tag != CONSTANT_Integer) {
00357         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR, "Not a CONSTANT_Integer entry");
00358     }
00359 
00360     return cp_data_get_int32(cp->data, entry);
00361 } // cp_get_integer()
00362 
00363 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00364 
00372 float cp_get_float(const_pool_t *cp, uint16_t entry)
00373 {
00374     const_pool_type_t tag = cp_get_tag(cp, entry);
00375 
00376     if (tag != CONSTANT_Float) {
00377         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR, "Not a CONSTANT_Float entry");
00378     }
00379 
00380     return cp_data_get_float(cp->data, entry);
00381 } // cp_get_float()
00382 
00383 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00384 
00392 int64_t cp_get_long(const_pool_t *cp, uint16_t entry)
00393 {
00394     const_pool_type_t tag = cp_get_tag(cp, entry);
00395 
00396     if (tag != CONSTANT_Long) {
00397         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR, "Not a CONSTANT_Long entry");
00398     }
00399 
00400     return cp_data_get_int64(cp->data, entry);
00401 } // cp_get_long()
00402 
00403 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00404 
00412 double cp_get_double(const_pool_t *cp, uint16_t entry)
00413 {
00414     const_pool_type_t tag = cp_get_tag(cp, entry);
00415 
00416     if (tag != CONSTANT_Double) {
00417         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR, "Not a CONSTANT_Double entry");
00418     }
00419 
00420     return cp_data_get_double(cp->data, entry);
00421 } // cp_get_double()
00422 
00423 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00424 
00430 char *cp_get_name_and_type_name(const_pool_t *cp, uint16_t entry)
00431 {
00432     const_pool_type_t tag = cp_get_tag(cp, entry);
00433     uint16_t string_index;
00434 
00435     if (tag != CONSTANT_NameAndType) {
00436         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00437                 "Not a CONSTANT_NameAndType entry");
00438     }
00439 
00440     string_index = cp_data_get_name_and_type_name(cp->data, entry);
00441     return cp_get_string(cp, string_index);
00442 } // cp_get_name_and_type_name()
00443 
00449 char *cp_get_name_and_type_type(const_pool_t *cp, uint16_t entry)
00450 {
00451     const_pool_type_t tag = cp_get_tag(cp, entry);
00452     uint16_t string_index;
00453 
00454     if (tag != CONSTANT_NameAndType) {
00455         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00456                 "Not a CONSTANT_NameAndType entry");
00457     }
00458 
00459     string_index = cp_data_get_name_and_type_descriptor(cp->data, entry);
00460     return cp_get_string(cp, string_index);
00461 } // cp_get_name_and_type_name()
00462 
00468 uint16_t cp_get_fieldref_class(const_pool_t *cp, uint16_t entry)
00469 {
00470     const_pool_type_t tag = cp_get_tag(cp, entry);
00471 
00472     if (tag != CONSTANT_Fieldref) {
00473         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00474                 "Not a CONSTANT_Fieldref entry");
00475     }
00476 
00477     return cp_data_get_fieldref_class(cp->data, entry);
00478 } // cp_get_fieldref_class()
00479 
00485 char *cp_get_fieldref_name(const_pool_t *cp, uint16_t entry)
00486 {
00487     const_pool_type_t tag = cp_get_tag(cp, entry);
00488     uint16_t name_and_type_index;
00489 
00490     if (tag != CONSTANT_Fieldref) {
00491         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00492                 "Not a CONSTANT_Fieldref entry");
00493     }
00494 
00495     name_and_type_index = cp_data_get_fieldref_name_and_type(cp->data, entry);
00496     return cp_get_name_and_type_name(cp, name_and_type_index);
00497 } // cp_get_fieldref_name()
00498 
00504 char *cp_get_fieldref_type(const_pool_t *cp, uint16_t entry) {
00505     const_pool_type_t tag = cp_get_tag(cp, entry);
00506     uint16_t name_and_type_index;
00507 
00508     if (tag != CONSTANT_Fieldref) {
00509         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00510                 "Not a CONSTANT_Fieldref entry");
00511     }
00512 
00513     name_and_type_index = cp_data_get_fieldref_name_and_type(cp->data, entry);
00514     return cp_get_name_and_type_type(cp, name_and_type_index);
00515 } // cp_get_fieldref_type()
00516 
00522 char *cp_get_methodref_name(const_pool_t *cp, uint16_t entry)
00523 {
00524     const_pool_type_t tag = cp_get_tag(cp, entry);
00525     uint16_t name_and_type_index;
00526 
00527     if (tag != CONSTANT_Methodref) {
00528         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00529                 "Not a CONSTANT_Methodref entry");
00530     }
00531 
00532     name_and_type_index = cp_data_get_fieldref_name_and_type(cp->data, entry);
00533     return cp_get_name_and_type_name(cp, name_and_type_index);
00534 } // cp_get_methodref_name()
00535 
00541 char *cp_get_methodref_descriptor(const_pool_t *cp, uint16_t entry)
00542 {
00543     const_pool_type_t tag = cp_get_tag(cp, entry);
00544     uint16_t name_and_type_index;
00545 
00546     if (tag != CONSTANT_Methodref) {
00547         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00548                 "Not a CONSTANT_Methodref entry");
00549     }
00550 
00551     name_and_type_index = cp_data_get_fieldref_name_and_type(cp->data, entry);
00552     return cp_get_name_and_type_type(cp, name_and_type_index);
00553 } // cp_get_methodref_descriptor()
00554 
00560 uint16_t cp_get_methodref_class(const_pool_t *cp, uint16_t entry)
00561 {
00562     const_pool_type_t tag = cp_get_tag(cp, entry);
00563 
00564     if (tag != CONSTANT_Methodref) {
00565         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00566                 "Not a CONSTANT_Methodref entry");
00567     }
00568 
00569     return cp_data_get_fieldref_class(cp->data, entry);
00570 } // cp_get_methodref_class()
00571 
00577 char *cp_get_interfacemethodref_name(const_pool_t *cp, uint16_t entry)
00578 {
00579     const_pool_type_t tag = cp_get_tag(cp, entry);
00580     uint16_t name_and_type_index;
00581 
00582     if (tag != CONSTANT_InterfaceMethodref) {
00583         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00584                 "Not a CONSTANT_InterfaceMethodref entry");
00585     }
00586 
00587     name_and_type_index = cp_data_get_fieldref_name_and_type(cp->data, entry);
00588     return cp_get_name_and_type_name(cp, name_and_type_index);
00589 } // cp_get_interfacemethodref_name()
00590 
00596 char *cp_get_interfacemethodref_descriptor(const_pool_t *cp, uint16_t entry)
00597 {
00598     const_pool_type_t tag = cp_get_tag(cp, entry);
00599     uint16_t name_and_type_index;
00600 
00601     if (tag != CONSTANT_InterfaceMethodref) {
00602         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00603                 "Not a CONSTANT_InterfaceMethodref entry");
00604     }
00605 
00606     name_and_type_index = cp_data_get_fieldref_name_and_type(cp->data, entry);
00607     return cp_get_name_and_type_type(cp, name_and_type_index);
00608 } // cp_get_interfacemethodref_descriptor()
00609 
00615 uint16_t cp_get_interfacemethodref_class(const_pool_t *cp, uint16_t entry)
00616 {
00617     const_pool_type_t tag = cp_get_tag(cp, entry);
00618 
00619     if (tag != CONSTANT_InterfaceMethodref) {
00620         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR,
00621                 "Not a CONSTANT_InterfaceMethodref entry");
00622     }
00623 
00624     return cp_data_get_fieldref_class(cp->data, entry);
00625 } // cp_get_interfacemethodref_class()
00626 
00627 #ifdef JEL_PRINT
00628 
00632 void cp_print(const_pool_t *cp)
00633 {
00634     for (size_t i = 0; i < cp->entries; i++) {
00635         switch (tag_read(cp->tags, i)) {
00636             case 0:
00637                 printf("#%zu: Empty entry\n", i);
00638                 break;
00639 
00640             case CONSTANT_Utf8:
00641                 printf("#%zu: CONSTANT_Utf8: %s\n",
00642                        i, (char *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp->data, i));
00643                 break;
00644 
00645             case CONSTANT_Integer:
00646                 printf("#%zu: CONSTANT_Integer: %d\n",
00647                        i, cp_data_get_int32(cp->data, i));
00648                 break;
00649 
00650 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00651             case CONSTANT_Float:
00652                 printf("#%zu: CONSTANT_Float: %f\n",
00653                        i, cp_data_get_float(cp->data, i));
00654                 break;
00655 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00656 
00657             case CONSTANT_Long:
00658 #if SIZEOF_LONG == 8
00659                 printf("#%zu: CONSTANT_Long: %ld\n",
00660                        i, cp_data_get_int64(cp->data, i));
00661 #else
00662                 printf("#%zu: CONSTANT_Long: %lld\n",
00663                        i, cp_data_get_int64(cp->data, i));
00664 #endif // SIZEOF_LONG == 8
00665                 break;
00666 
00667 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00668             case CONSTANT_Double:
00669                 printf("#%zu: CONSTANT_Double: %f\n",
00670                        i, cp_data_get_double(cp->data, i));
00671                 break;
00672 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00673 
00674             case CONSTANT_Class:
00675                 printf("#%zu: CONSTANT_Class: %d\n",
00676                        i, cp_data_get_uint16(cp->data, i));
00677                 break;
00678 
00679             case CONSTANT_String:
00680                 printf("#%zu: CONSTANT_String: %p\n",
00681                        i, cp_data_get_ptr(cp->data, i));
00682                 break;
00683 
00684             case CONSTANT_Fieldref:
00685                 printf("#%zu: CONSTANT_Fieldref: %d, %d\n",
00686                        i, cp_data_get_fieldref_class(cp->data, i),
00687                        cp_data_get_fieldref_name_and_type(cp->data, i));
00688                 break;
00689 
00690             case CONSTANT_Methodref:
00691                 printf("#%zu: CONSTANT_Methodref: %d, %d\n",
00692                        i, cp_data_get_fieldref_class(cp->data, i),
00693                        cp_data_get_fieldref_name_and_type(cp->data, i));
00694                 break;
00695 
00696             case CONSTANT_InterfaceMethodref:
00697                 printf("#%zu: CONSTANT_InterfaceMethodref: %d, %d\n",
00698                        i, cp_data_get_fieldref_class(cp->data, i),
00699                        cp_data_get_fieldref_name_and_type(cp->data, i));
00700                 break;
00701 
00702             case CONSTANT_NameAndType:
00703                 printf("#%zu: CONSTANT_InterfaceMethodref: %d, %d\n",
00704                        i, cp_data_get_name_and_type_name(cp->data, i),
00705                        cp_data_get_name_and_type_descriptor(cp->data, i));
00706                 break;
00707 
00708             default:
00709                 printf("#%zu: Invalid entry!!!\n", i);
00710         }
00711     }
00712 } // cp_print()
00713 
00714 #endif // JEL_PRINT
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:25 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
